chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Hello friends, welcome to the part 3 of the computer training course.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In the last video, we learned the basics of the taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Today we will learn how to cover in the taskbar and multitasking magic.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Today you will learn to fully customize your computer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's start the video without wasting time.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Friends, instead of going inside the taskbar setting, there is also a shortcut.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Just right click on any empty space in the taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This list is called the context menu.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There are some tricks hidden in it that will organize your scattered work in a second.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: First of all, if your taskbar is full, then clean it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If the search bar is taking a lot of space, then go to search and show search icon or headon.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Space will be saved.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you don't want to see weather and news below, then turn off news and interest.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want, then turn on from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's come to the most useful feature of the menu, Windows Management.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Suppose you have opened 4-5 programs and there is a mess on the screen.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Don't set each one.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Just right click on the taskbar and see the three options.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Cascade Windows

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: As soon as you click on it, all the windows will be set one after the other like a crown.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then this option is show windows stack.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This will set the windows up and down.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But my favorite is show windows side by side.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Imagine you have to type something in the word by searching for data from Chrome.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Just keep both open.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Right click and press show windows side by side.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The computer will automatically split the screen.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This feature saves a lot of time while doing data entry or research in corporate life.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you have opened a lot of files and suddenly you need a file on the desktop,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then don't waste time in minimizing everyone.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Just click on show the desktop.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: All windows will sit down together and the desktop will be clearly visible.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There is also a shortcut for this, Windows D.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Come to the desktop and the last one is task manager.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If your computer hangs and no software is being closed, then don't worry.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Right click and open task manager.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Select the program that is bothering you, right click and do the end task.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The computer will go back to normal.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to master the taskbar in real meaning, then it is very important to learn the keyboard shortcut.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It doubles your speed.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Windows D will move on the icon of the taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Windows 1 will open the pin app.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Similarly, if we want to open another pin app, then Windows 2.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Windows D to show and hide the desktop.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Alt plus tab to switch between open windows.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This shortcut is a game changer for office and corporate life.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's come to the most interesting part of this video, taskbar customization.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Don't you like the color of the strip below or the place?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Are the icons looking too big?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's set it completely according to our own.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: First of all, right click on a blank space on the taskbar and go to the taskbar setting.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The first option here is lock the taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's understand the logic of this.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If it is on, then it will stick to the taskbar like a phoenix.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can't move it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you turn it off, then you can pull it by pressing the left button of the mouse.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: See I unlocked it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now I can press the left button of the mouse and take it to the top right or left.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Many designers and coders like to keep it on the side or top.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But for now, we put it back down and lock it so that it doesn't move by mistake.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you don't want to drag, then there is also an option of taskbar location on screen.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here you can select bottom, top, left or right from the drop-down.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: After this, there are two amazing options.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Automatically hide the taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: By turning it on, the taskbar will disappear.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: When you bring the mouse down, it will be visible.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you like to work on full screen, then this option is for you.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If there are many software pins on your taskbar and there is less space, then turn it on.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This will make the icons smaller.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now a very important setting, notification area icons.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Sometimes important icons like network or volume are hidden by mistake.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now if we want to turn them back on or remove some icons or add some new ones,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then how do we do that? Let's see.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: For this, scroll down and click on select which icons appear on the taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here you will get a list of all icons.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Turn on the one you want to show and turn off the one you want to hide.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now to go back to this setting, click on this arrow or press the backspace button.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now the most interesting thing is how to change the color of the taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's see.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: For this, click on colors on the left side.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Pay attention here, this is very important.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If there is a light selector in choose your color, then the color of the taskbar will not change in Windows 10 or 11.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The option will remain disabled.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To change the color, select custom or dark in choose your color.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Scroll down a bit and choose your favorite color from choose your accent color.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like blue, red, green and the last step, tick on the start, taskbar and action center box at the bottom.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now see your taskbar, start menu and action center, all the background colors have changed.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now your computer is completely professional and personalized.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So friends, this was the complete A to Z training of the taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: From the search box to the virtual desktop, action center, shortcuts and full customization.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you have watched this video carefully, then now you will be able to use the computer more fast, smart and professionally than before.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So you keep practicing, keep watching the video again and again.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And if you need anything, then the comment box is open for you.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And tell by commenting which feature of the taskbar you are going to use the most.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you found the video helpful, then do like it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Subscribe to the GIS Tech Guru channel because here the computer is taught in simple Hindi, step by step.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: See you in the next video, till then bye.
